name: grid-table-editor
description: A simple Data Table Editor that generates Markdown, CSV or JSON. It can also be used to interchange data between the formats, supporting editing in the grid.

scripts.lint:docker: docker run --rm -i hadolint/hadolint < apps/api/Dockerfile && docker run --rm -i hadolint/hadolint < apps/mcp/Dockerfile
scripts.verify:local: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm test && npm run test:workspaces
scripts.verify:ci: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run testcoverage && npm run test:workspaces && npm run lint:docker && npm run test:browser
scripts.anywaydata:mac: npm run anywaydata --prefix docs-src && cp ./app.html ./build/app.html && cp ./generator.html ./build/generator.html && cp -R ./images ./build/images && mkdir -p ./build/packages && cp -R ./packages/core ./build/packages/core && cp -R ./packages/core-ui ./build/packages/core-ui && cp -R ./libs ./build/libs && cp ./styles.css ./build/styles.css && cp -R ./build/ ../../anywaydata-com
scripts.anywaydata:win: npm run anywaydata --prefix docs-src && echo copying index && copy .\app.html .\build\app.html && echo copying images && copy .\generator.html .\build\generator.html && xcopy .\images .\build\images /e /k /i && if not exist .\build\packages mkdir .\build\packages && xcopy .\packages\core .\build\packages\core /e /k /i && xcopy .\packages\core-ui .\build\packages\core-ui /e /k /i && xcopy .\libs .\build\libs /e /k /i && copy .\styles.css .\build\styles.css && echo cleaning anywaydata for deployment && ..\anywaydata-com\make-ready-for-prod.bat

author: Alan Richardson
